    1. JndiNameType()

Class JndiNameType

java.lang.Object
org.apache.axis2.jaxws.description.xml.handler.String
org.apache.axis2.jaxws.description.xml.handler.JndiNameType
Direct Known Subclasses:
EjbRefNameType
public class JndiNameType extends String
The jndi-nameType type designates a JNDI name in the Deployment Component's environment and is relative to the java:comp/env context. A JNDI name must be unique within the Deployment Component.

Java class for jndi-nameType complex type.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class. 

<complexType name="jndi-nameType">
  <simpleContent>
    <restriction base="<http://java.sun.com/xml/ns/javaee>string">
    </restriction>
  </simpleContent>
</complexType>
